mechanism_narrative: Positive real retail sales momentum signals resilient household demand and near-term earnings support; higher 3-month growth in RSAFS predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS value is 478873.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in more than 60% of walk-forward test windows.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above a low-rate threshold marks active policy tightening; higher FEDFUNDS raises discount rates and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.0% after being at or below 1.0% within the prior 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS value is 1.15 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean return exceeds the unconditional mean by more than 25 bps.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion combined with falling unemployment signals broad income growth without labor-market deterioration; joint PAYEMS gains and UNRATE declines predict positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS value is 146615.0 and UNRATE value is 4.3 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down state does not outperform other labor states on 60-day forward S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production weakness signals deteriorating cyclical output and operating leverage; a downward break in INDPRO predicts negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its 6-month moving average after being above it in the prior month
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO value is 105.16 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downward-break triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or have nonnegative average forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: Falling housing starts during a rising-rate environment signals rate-sensitive demand destruction; joint HOUST declines and FEDFUNDS increases predict negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 5% over 3 months while FEDFUNDS rises over the same 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST value is 1215.0 as of t-2mo and FEDFUNDS value is 1.15 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-down and rates-up trigger has a 60-day forward hit rate for negative S&P 500 returns below 50% across the full walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI inflation increases expected policy restraint and compresses equity valuation multiples; higher 3-month CPIAUCSL inflation momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL value is 244.048 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL acceleration has positive average 5-day S&P 500 forward returns or a Rank IC above -0.01 in two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid unemployment-rate increase signals rising recession risk and falling earnings expectations; a sharp UNRATE upswing predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE value is 4.3 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if downside hit rate is not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP expansion signals broad demand growth and supports aggregate earnings; positive quarter-over-quarter growth in GDPC1 predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses above 0% after being at or below 0% in the prior quarter
evidence_refs: fact:latest GDPC1 value is 17010.7 as of t-4mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth-crossing triggers do not produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than nontriggered periods in at least 55% of walk-forward windows.
